title: tadehagi triquetrum subsp. rodgeri
intro: Tadehagi triquetrum subsp. rodgeri, also known as Australian tare or rodgeri sub species, is a perennial legume native to Australia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The plant's health benefits are attributed to its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce anxiety, and act as a diuretic, making it a potential treatment for conditions such as hypertension and kidney stones. Tadehagi triquetrum subsp. rodgeri can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts for medicinal use, and its roots and leaves are often used in traditional medicine.
